events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Given the package is missing the quantity takeoff needed to establish total loop count vs. completed count, the checkpoint can't be scored for percent-complete or pass/fail — I flagged it as `needs_more_info` (low risk, no defects observed in what was submitted) and listed the missing takeoff/loop-tag cross-reference as the required follow-up.
